# ralph-cli

## Commands

- Build: `npm run build`
- Test: `npm test`
- Run (build mode): `ralph run` ‚Äî spawn agent, implement next task, commit, loop
- Run (plan mode): `ralph run plan` ‚Äî spawn agent to generate/update IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md
- Run with max iterations: `ralph run plan --max 3`
- Override agent: `ralph run --agent codex`
- Dry run: `ralph run --dry-run` ‚Äî show prompt without executing
- Resume from checkpoint: `ralph run --resume`
- Typecheck: `npx tsc --noEmit`
- Lint: `npm run lint`
- Run locally: `node dist/cli.js <command>`
- Link for dev: `npm link` ‚Üí `ralph <command>`

## Project Structure

- `src/cli.ts` ‚Äî Entry point, command router (commander)
- `src/commands/<name>/index.ts` ‚Äî One directory per command
  - `init/` `lint/` `grade/` `gc/` `doctor/` `plan/` `promote/` `ref/` `hooks/` `ci/` `run/`
  - `config-validate.ts` ‚Äî Standalone config validation
- `src/commands/lint/engine.ts` ‚Äî Rule framework (built-in + custom)
- `src/commands/lint/imports.ts` ‚Äî Import parser
- `src/commands/lint/files.ts` ‚Äî File collector
- `src/commands/lint/rules/` ‚Äî Built-in lint rules
- `src/config/` ‚Äî Config system
  - `schema.ts` (types), `loader.ts` (find + parse + merge), `validate.ts`, `defaults.ts`
- `src/utils/` ‚Äî Shared utilities
  - `fs.ts` (ensureDir, safeReadFile, safeWriteFile), `output.ts` (colored console)
- `docs/product-specs/` ‚Äî Feature specifications
- `.ralph/` ‚Äî Project config and custom rules
- `dist/` ‚Äî Compiled output (git-ignored)

## Documentation

| Document | Purpose |
|----------|---------|
| `ARCHITECTURE.md` | Domain boundaries, layers, dependency rules |
| `IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md` | Current state, command status, deferred items |
| `CHANGELOG.md` | Full release history (reverse chronological) |
| `docs/product-specs/repo-scaffolding.md` | What `ralph init` creates and why |
| `docs/product-specs/taste-escalation.md` | The promote/escalation ladder concept |
| `docs/product-specs/drift-detection.md` | What `ralph gc` catches |
| `docs/product-specs/architectural-enforcement.md` | What `ralph lint` enforces |
| `docs/product-specs/quality-grading.md` | How `ralph grade` scores projects |
| `docs/product-specs/repo-diagnostics.md` | What `ralph doctor` checks |
| `docs/product-specs/configuration.md` | Config schema and defaults |
| `docs/product-specs/execution-plans.md` | How `ralph plan` works |
| `docs/product-specs/references.md` | How `ralph ref` manages external docs |
| `docs/product-specs/integration.md` | Hooks and CI generation |

## Operational Notes

- **ESM only** ‚Äî `import` statements, never `require()`. `.ts` imports resolve to `.js` in output.
- **`exactOptionalPropertyTypes`** ‚Äî Optional props need `| undefined` (e.g., `description?: string | undefined`).
- **YAML 1.2** ‚Äî Single-quote regex patterns with backslashes in `.yml` (e.g., `pattern: 'console\\.log'`).
- **Test isolation** ‚Äî Tests `chdir()` to temp dirs with `.git/` stubs. Always restore `origCwd` in `afterEach`.
- **Config resolution** ‚Äî Walks up directories for `.ralph/config.yml`. Falls back to defaults.
- **vitest.config.ts** ‚Äî Excludes `dist/` to prevent running compiled test copies.
- **tsconfig.json** ‚Äî `"include": ["src"]` to exclude vitest.config.ts from compilation.
- **LLM-agnostic** ‚Äî Zero references to specific AI providers or models anywhere in source or templates.
